text: An Automotive Manufacturer: a Manufacturer of at least one model of automobile (as defined in the ISC) that has produced at least 3,000 units during the past 12 months.

metadata.definition: a Manufacturer of at least one model of automobile (as defined in the ISC) that has produced at least 3,000 units during the past 12 months.

text: The Core Activities of an Automotive Manufacturer: the Design, production and sale of automobiles (as defined in the ISC).

metadata.term: The Core Activities of an Automotive Manufacturer
metadata.definition: the Design, production and sale of automobiles (as defined in the ISC).

text: All volumes: implicitly symmetrical about the plane Y=0.

metadata.definition: implicitly symmetrical about the plane Y=0.

text: The CAD models of all the volumes and surfaces listed in this Appendix: available for F1 Teams or PU Manufacturers to download with a standard range of parameters. The FIA will provide F1 Teams or PU Manufacturers with a specific model on request.

text: Stay / Bracket / Support / Fairing Reference Volumes Each individual Stay, Bracket, Support or Fairing Volume: composed of the elements listed, by row, in the following table. In each row, the fully defined Reference Volume is an axis-aligned cuboid, which has one interior diagonal defined by the listed points. Reference Volumes with multiple pairs of points are comprised of multiple cuboids. Each individual cuboid must first be defined sequentially by the respective pair of points and all cuboids combined to form the single Reference Volume. 33.
